_comment: NPC: Wang Tianshui (王天水). Canon ID: N02. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Wang Tianshui
personality: stern but loving father; village patriarch

perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Same — mortal, but you sense his lifeforce flickering

note: Wang Lin's father; driven to ruin by Teng family

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: Lin'er, your mother prepared extra food today. Eat before you go wandering.
The Teng family's servants were in the market again, buying up grain. Mark my words — they are squeezing us out.
I have heard the Heng Yue Sect elder will arrive soon for the aptitude test. Every family in the village is nervous.

sect_tasks.description: Wang Tianshui sets down his tools: 'I need oak planks for the governor's commission. Can you bring me some? The family could use the extra copper.'
Wang Tianshui wipes sawdust from his brow: 'If you can gather sticks for the framework, I will share some of my iron supply. We are running low.'
